prompt: I modified three hooks last week and want to verify I didn't introduce regressions before cutting the next release. Run the benchmark suite and compare against the last baseline.
expected_output: User runs bash scripts/benchmark/test-hooks.sh and gets exit code 0 if all hooks pass functional tests. Runs aggregate-results.sh which outputs new score, compares hook_score against previous baseline in audit-artifacts/benchmark-baseline.json. If regressed, reports which hook(s) failed.
